component.name: PyWebSearch
component.summary: Customizable web search tool with aliases, !bangs and GUI

description.p: PyWebSearch is a fast, customizable web search tool with a user-friendly GUI. It supports search aliases, DuckDuckGo bangs, and direct URL opening.

ul.li: Search using customizable aliases (e.g., g:query for Google)
Support for DuckDuckGo bang commands (e.g., !w query for Wikipedia)
Direct URL opening with configurable prefix
Alias management: create, edit, set defaults
Search history with viewing and clearing
Cross-platform support with native browser detection
